# .obstral.md - Runtime eval fixture

## Stack

Rust

## Test Command

test_cmd: cargo test -q merge_gate::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/merge-gate-smoke.sh

## Development Rules

- Read the target file before editing it.
- Make the smallest safe code change that fixes the failing merge-gate tests.
- If merge-gate rollback board semantics change, update `docs/state-schema.md` and `.obstral/runtime_eval.json` in the same change.
- Failed merge-gate cases must not become approved through stale review state.
- Run `cargo test -q merge_gate::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/merge-gate-smoke.sh` before calling done.
